// why click2seek

Learning that
actually sticks

We don't teach from slides alone. Every concept is paired with hands-on projects, real hardware, and industry-relevant challenges.

Whether you're a complete beginner or already tinkering with circuits, our structured roadmaps meet you where you are.

🔬
Hands-On Labs
Real hardware, real code, real results — every session.
🗺️
Structured Roadmaps
Clear path from zero to project-ready in days.
💬
Doubt Clearing
Dedicated sessions to clear every doubt you have.
🏆
Certificates
Industry-recognized credentials for your portfolio.
click2seek_lab.sh
student@click2seek:~$ ./start_journey.sh
🚀 Initializing AI + IoT environment...
✓ Arduino IDE connected
✓ Raspberry Pi detected on /dev/ttyUSB0
✓ ROS2 Humble workspace sourced
→ Loading your first project: Smart Sensor Bot
✓ Ready! Your learning journey begins now.
student@click2seek:~$

// student stories

What our students say

★★★★★

I had zero hardware experience before Click2Seek. After the IoT course, I built a smart irrigation system for my college project. The mentors were incredibly supportive.

A
Arjun Sharma
B.Tech ECE, NITK
★★★★★

The Robotics with ROS workshop was mind-blowing. We went from knowing nothing about ROS to building a fully autonomous maze-solving bot. Unreal experience.

P
Priya Nair
Robotics Enthusiast, Chennai
★★★★★

Click2Seek's AI course made complex topics like CNNs and transfer learning actually understandable. I used what I learned to win a national hackathon!

R
Riya Mehta
AI Developer, Pune

// see the tech in action

Live Tech Simulations

We don't just talk about technology — we simulate it. Here's a glimpse of what you'll build and understand in our courses.

Neural Network · Live
Neural Network Forward Pass
Watch data propagate through layers of a neural network in real-time. Each node activates as signals flow forward — exactly how AI models think.
Deep Learning Backpropagation TensorFlow AI Course
IoT Sensor Network · Live
IoT Sensor Data Flow
Sensors pinging a gateway, data packets flying to the cloud — this is what your ESP32 and Raspberry Pi projects look like at a network level.
ESP32 MQTT AWS IoT IoT Course
Robot Path Planning · Live
Autonomous Robot Navigation
A robot finding the shortest path through obstacles using A* algorithm — the same algorithm powering real ROS2 navigation stacks you'll build in class.
ROS2 A* Algorithm SLAM Robotics Course
Oscilloscope · PWM Signal · Live
Microcontroller PWM & ADC Signals
Real-time oscilloscope showing PWM signals like those you'll generate on Arduino and STM32. Understand duty cycles, frequency and analog-to-digital conversion.
Arduino PWM ADC Embedded Course
